title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lifestyle - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lifestyle - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lifestyle! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lifestyle:
Lifestyle is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle!
